subject: Whirlipede, a disc-shaped armored cocoon-like bug Pokemon
description: A large disc-shaped armored creature with protruding spines and horn-like appendages rolls or rests on rocky terrain. Its body is grey and purple with a dark segmented cocoon structure. Spiky protrusions extend from the rim of the disc. The setting is a reddish canyon or cliff landscape with warm layered rock formations in the background and some sparse vegetation visible. The creature appears solid and heavy, almost like a wheel-shaped shell with spikes.
foreground: Whirlipede on rocky ground, disc-shaped grey-purple armored body with spines
background: red-orange canyon cliffs, layered rock, sparse green vegetation
